title: Talking Blocks
description: This is a mod for one of my videos on YouTube! It makes blocks talk.
body:
This mod is a funny and choatic one that was inspired by a Minecraft youtuber named Knarfy, from, well, YouTube! He realsed a video 3 years ago (2023), where he coded his viewer's mod ideas into the game, and two people wanted talking blocks. So, I remade his mod with different voice lines. 
It adds the following features:
- Living blocks that talk. (even when they die, drops grass blocks)
- Voicelines can be heard when you break ANY block.
- More coming soon...! (eg. Breeding)


Notes:
1. BLOCKS WILL ONLY SPAWN IN HOSTILE MODES. CURRENTLY, PEACEFUL MODE IS NOT SUPPORTED, BUT THE BLOCKS WON'T ATTACK THE PLAYER.
2. This mod is not finished yet and was made in MCreator

Now go enjoy the choas!
